title: trifolium latifolium
intro: Trifolium latifolium, also known as big trefoil or broad-leaved clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. The plant contains isoflavones and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Big trefoil is used to support women's health, particularly in alleviating menopausal symptoms and reducing the risk of osteoporosis, thanks to its estrogenic activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
